steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
The equation is $66x = 66x$. Since both sides are identical, subtracting $66x$ from both sides gives:
$$0 = 0$$

steps.title: Interpret the result
steps.content:
The equation $0 = 0$ is always true, independent of $x$. This means every real number satisfies the original equation. Therefore, there are infinitely many solutions.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
